governor.name: Maura Healey
governor.title: Governor
governor.background: Massachusetts' 73rd Governor. Former state Attorney General (2013–2023). First woman and openly LGBTQ+ person elected governor of Massachusetts. Focuses on climate, housing, and economic equity.

ltGovernor.name: Kim Driscoll
ltGovernor.title: Lieutenant Governor
ltGovernor.background: Massachusetts' 74th Lieutenant Governor. Former Mayor of Salem (2006–2023). Chairs the Governor's Council and oversees state workforce development and economic policy.

attorneyGeneral.name: Andrea Campbell
attorneyGeneral.title: Attorney General
attorneyGeneral.background: Massachusetts Attorney General since 2023. Former Boston City Councilor and Boston City Council President. Focuses on consumer protection, civil rights, and public safety.

secretaryOfState.name: William Galvin
secretaryOfState.title: Secretary of State
secretaryOfState.background: Massachusetts Secretary of State since 1995, the longest-serving in state history. Oversees elections, public records, and the Massachusetts Archives. Former state representative.

treasurer.name: Deborah Goldberg
treasurer.title: State Treasurer
treasurer.office: One Ashburton Place, 12th Floor, Boston, MA 02108
treasurer.background: Massachusetts State Treasurer since 2015. Former Brookline Board of Selectmen member and state representative. Oversees state finances, pension funds, and economic development programs.

auditor.name: Diana DiZoglio
auditor.title: State Auditor
auditor.office: One Ashburton Place, Room 1819, Boston, MA 02108
auditor.background: Massachusetts State Auditor since 2023. Former state senator representing the First Essex District. Focuses on government accountability, fiscal oversight, and transparency.

senators.name: Elizabeth Warren
senators.title: U.S. Senator
senators.office: 317 Russell Senate Office Building, Washington, DC 20510
senators.background: U.S. Senator since 2013. Harvard Law professor and consumer-protection advocate. Former Special Advisor to the President and Assistant to the Treasury Secretary. Created the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

senators.name: Edward Markey
senators.title: U.S. Senator
senators.office: 255 Dirksen Senate Office Building, Washington, DC 20510
senators.background: U.S. Senator since 2013. Previously served in the U.S. House of Representatives for 37 years (1976–2013). Known for environmental and climate legislation including the Green New Deal resolution.

representative.title: U.S. Representative

representative.background: U.S. Representative since 1989. Ranking Member of the Ways and Means Committee. Former Mayor of Springfield (1984–1989). Senior member focused on tax policy, trade, and retirement security.
